raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr tahs Eekſchas/ un
Gr: tahs Kahjas maſgaja wiſch ar
Uhdeni/ un Mohſus eededſinaja
wiſfu to Annu us to Altari/ tas
biſa weens Dedſams-Uppurs tahs
faldaſ Smarſchas / weens ug-
guns biſa tas tam KUNGAM/
ittin ka tas KUNGS Mohſum
bij pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to peewedde wiſch
to ohtru Annu/ ta Bildeſchanas-
Uppura Annu/ un Aarons ar fa-
weein Dehlecun likke fawas Roh-
kas us ta Anna Galwu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas tappe nokauts/un
Mohſus nehme no winna Affins/
un likke to us Aarona labbas
Auts-Skripſtizu / un us winna
labbas Rohkas Jhſchki / un us
winna labbas Kahjas leelu Pirk-
ſtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiſch peewedde arridsan
Aarona Dehlus/ un Mohſus likke
no ta Affins us winnu labbas
Auts-Skripſtizu / un us winnu
labbas Rohkas Jhſchki / un us
winna labbas Kahjas leelu Pirk-
ſtu/ un Mohſus flazzijato Affini
us to Altari aptahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſch nehme tohs
Gr: Tankus/ un winna Astu/ un wiſ-
fus Tankus/ kas pee Eekſchahm
irr/ un tohs Tankus pee Aknim/
un abbejas Jhſtis un winnu
Tankumu/ ir to labbo Plezzu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſch nehme arridsan Wahrijeet to Galtu pr
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch likke tahs
Aarona Rohkahm / un
na Dehlu Rohkahm/ un
tohs par Kuſtinachan-
preeſſch ta KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to nehme
tohs no winnu Rohkah-
dedsinaja tohs us ta
Uppura-Altari / tee bi-
ſchanas-Uppuri tah-
Smarſchas/ tas biſa u-
guns tam KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Mohſus ne-
Kruhtis / un kuſtinaja
Kuſtinachanas-Uppur-
ta KUNGA/no ta Bild-
Uppura Annu/ tahs b-
sum par Daktu/ itti-
KUNGS Mohſum
wehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Mohsus ne-
dsan no tahs Swaidisch-
jes/ un no ta Affins/
Altari bija/ un flazzija
aronu/ un winna Dre-
us winna Dehlecun/ un
Dehlu Drehbehn ar w-
eeswehtija Aarons u-
Drehbes/ un winna D-
winna Dehlu Drehbes
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Mohsus fa-
aronu / un us winna
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
